product: YNX Chain Documentation and Public Disclosure Package

stateEvidence.implementedLocal: All named documentation-package artifacts exist and the repository docs-compliance gate passes.
stateEvidence.testedLocal: The complete local preflight and docs-compliance gate passed on the candidate working tree on 2026-07-22; final metadata reconciliation is rechecked before publication.
stateEvidence.installedLocal: Not applicable until a packaged documentation artifact exists; retained false rather than inferred.
stateEvidence.integratedCentral: Website handoff has not been accepted or integrated.
stateEvidence.deployedStaging: No direct staging deployment evidence is recorded.
stateEvidence.deployedPublic: The main website responded on 2026-07-22, but this candidate package is not deployed and service subdomains were not independently verified.
stateEvidence.downloadHosted: No immutable documentation package URL, digest, or byte count exists.
stateEvidence.storeReleased: No store release applies to this documentation candidate. False is retained for cross-product schema consistency.

publicClaimPolicy: Only claims linked to direct evidence may be published. Candidate, Testnet, preview, test-signed, unsigned, production-signed, and store-released states must remain distinct.
